description_long: This is a mid-sized, four-door sedan with a boxy, classic design reminiscent of late 1980s to early 1990s European cars. The body is primarily silver-gray with a slightly weathered, matte finish, and features black trim along the lower panels and around the windows. The windows are tinted blue, and the car has side mirrors on both front doors. The wheels are silver with a multi-spoke design, and the tires appear to be standard road tires. The front of the car has rectangular headlights and a wide, horizontal grille, while the rear features red tail lights and a rectangular license plate area. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, everyday vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A silver-gray, four-door sedan with a boxy, classic design, blue-tinted windows, and multi-spoke silver wheels. The car has a weathered finish and black trim, giving it a utilitarian urban look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing red tail lights, a rectangular license plate area, and the trunk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, blue-tinted windows, black trim, and multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying rectangular headlights, a wide grille, and the hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, blue-tinted windows, and wheel design.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plate present, rectangular, white with no readable text.
attribute_wheel_design: Silver wheels with a multi-spoke, circular design; spokes are thin and evenly spaced.
